hero.headline: An Exceptional Setting for Every Occasion
hero.body: Whether it's an intimate dinner for twelve or a celebration for sixty, The Meridian's private dining spaces offer an unparalleled backdrop for your most important moments.

spaces.name: The Salon
spaces.description: An intimate room with floor-to-ceiling windows, custom lighting, and a dedicated entrance. Ideal for birthday dinners, small corporate gatherings, and anniversary celebrations.

spaces.name: The Library
spaces.description: Our larger private space features walnut bookshelves, a private bar, and state-of-the-art AV equipment. Perfect for corporate events, rehearsal dinners, and cocktail receptions.

testimonial.quote: The Meridian made our rehearsal dinner absolutely perfect. From the custom menu to the impeccable service, every detail was thoughtful and elegant.
testimonial.author: Rebecca & Thomas

form.headline: Start Planning Your Event
form.description: Tell us about your event and our private dining team will be in touch within 24 hours.
